query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_academy_enrollments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  enrolledAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  INDEX userId (userId)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_academy_enrollments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  enrolledAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  INDEX userId (userId)
);
